content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reorganized around a curiosity-filtered episodic storage system, where intrinsic reward signals from ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning act as dynamic priority gates that only retain high-uncertainty, learning-relevant episodes into long-term agent memory, rather than storing all interaction data indiscriminately. This framework addresses the scaling bottleneck of modern large agent memory by pruning low-value memories before they cause context collapse.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
